chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2433 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on CMA No.10500/2021 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Hafeezullah advocate holds brief for Mr. Touqeer Ahmed, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General The matter pertains to suspension of sales tax registration, which according to learned counsel for the petitioner has been unjustifiably suspended. The respective learned counsel jointly propose that the petitioner shall avail the remedy per section 21 Sales Tax Act, 1990, within the period of 15 days; the respondent department would decide the representation expeditiously vide a speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner; pending such consideration, no further coercive action would be taken against the petitioner; any findings shall be subject to remedy before the appropriate forum and law. It is jointly submitted that this petition be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
